title: Define minimal memory layer
notes: Created base memory files and MVP scope.

title: Define memory schemas and update rules
notes: Added minimal schemas and rules for projects, ideas, and tasks.

title: Use memory automatically on every new task
notes: Added task-intake workflow and automatic memory-read rules.

title: Implement actual runtime memory usage
notes: Made task intake a runtime rule in AGENTS.md and completed one real task lifecycle example.

notes: Created codex_probe.txt with exact probe text.

notes: Patched runtime bootstrap loading to include memory/projects.json, memory/ideas.json, memory/tasks.json, and memory/context.md before each run.

title: Create phone_second.txt with SECOND_OK
notes: Create phone_second.txt in workspace root with exact content SECOND_OK.

title: Check OpenClaw orchestration model, .env OpenAI key, and token usage logs
notes: Inspected current orchestration model, checked /root/.openclaw/.env for OPENAI variables, and verified available usage data via session status and local logs.

title: Change OpenClaw orchestrator model to openai/gpt-4o-mini and restart
notes: Updated /root/.openclaw/openclaw.json main agent model to openai/gpt-4o-mini, restarted OpenClaw, and verified the saved config plus post-restart session status.

title: Diagnose which processes may be making LLM calls
notes: Step 1: inspect running services, ACP adapters, tmux, and background processes that could trigger Codex/Claude/OpenClaw model calls.

title: Record the global goal and current stabilization phase for OpenClaw MVP
notes: Saved the explicit global goal: build a reliable personal AI operator in Telegram with memory and controlled execution; current phase is architecture stabilization for subscription-safe, predictable runtime behavior.

title: Set acceleration stack mode for fast project launch and delivery
notes: Embedded project launch mode, AI role separation, GitHub starter sourcing, reusable module defaults, and n8n-as-sidecar delivery rules into AGENTS.md, docs/acceleration_stack.md, daily memory, and runtime log.

title: Configure OpenClaw session rotation for block-based work
notes: Adjusted session.threadBindings to idleHours=2 and maxAgeHours=8 so Telegram direct chats rotate into fresh sessions instead of keeping one persistent overheated context.

title: Implement stage 1 role cycle planner -> coder -> tester
notes: Created concrete workflow files and operating checklists for the first-stage execution loop in openclaw_system: planner_template.md, coder_execution.md, tester_checklist.md, stage1_execution_cycle.md, and updated workflow_definition.md/project_memory.md.

title: Implement stage 2 reviewer and feedback cycle
notes: Added reviewer_definition.md, review_checklist.md, fix_loop_definition.md, stage2_review_cycle.md, and updated workflow_definition.md, roles_definition.md, and project_memory.md so review becomes an explicit required stage after testing.

title: Implement stage 3 structured project memory layer
notes: Created structured memory files inside openclaw_system: project_memory_schema.md, memory_index.md, system_state.md, progress_log.md, active_context.md, decisions_log.md; updated project_memory.md to define how system state, progress, decisions, and active work are stored.

title: Implement stage 4 task queue with pending running failed done
notes: Created structured queue files and status rules inside openclaw_system: task_queue_schema.md, task_queue_rules.md, task_queue.json, task_queue_state.md; updated memory_index.md, system_state.md, progress_log.md, active_context.md, decisions_log.md, and project_memory.md.

title: Implement stage 5 GitHub and GitHub Actions layer
notes: Created github_layer.md, github_actions_layer.md, github_workflow_rules.md, github_actions_templates.md inside openclaw_system; updated memory_index.md, system_state.md, progress_log.md, active_context.md, decisions_log.md, and project_memory.md.

title: Implement stage 6 runtime stabilization layer
notes: Documented actual runtime state, PATH/tool availability, exec constraints, and stabilization rules inside openclaw_system; created runtime_state.md, runtime_stabilization_plan.md, runtime_tools_matrix.md, runtime_exec_rules.md, and runtime_smoke_checklist.md; updated system memory files.

title: Implement stage 7 n8n and integrations layer
notes: Documented actual integration baseline and created n8n/integrations operating layer inside openclaw_system: integrations_state.md, n8n_layer.md, integrations_catalog.md, integrations_rules.md, n8n_activation_checklist.md; updated system memory files and honestly marked n8n as planned, not confirmed active.

title: Implement stage 8 guardrails and action limits layer
notes: Created guardrails_layer.md, risk_tiers.md, approval_rules.md, blocked_actions.md, action_limits.md, and guardrails_checklist.md inside openclaw_system; updated system memory files to make guardrails a permanent system layer.

title: Implement stage 9 auxiliary models layer
notes: Created aux_models_layer.md, aux_models_catalog.md, model_routing_rules.md, aux_models_usage_policy.md, and model_activation_checklist.md based on actual openclaw.json allowlist and main Codex path; updated system memory files.

title: Implement stage 10 scenario templates
notes: Created bugfix_template.md, feature_template.md, refactor_template.md, scenario_selection_rules.md, and scenario_workflow_map.md inside openclaw_system; updated system memory files and marked the base 10-stage plan complete.

title: Run stage1 runtime task runner probe
notes: Probe task for FOUNDATION REPAIR of Stage 1 runtime enforcement.
plan: Run code_command only if plan exists, then enforce test_command before allowing done.
test_command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('/root/.openclaw/workspace/runtime/stage1_probe_result.txt')
assert p.exists(), 'result file missing'
text = p.read_text().strip()
assert text == 'stage1 runner ok', f'unexpected content: {text!r}'
print('test passed')
PY
